title: Stardom's Ghasts
body:
![stardoms ghasts banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/338cff9403f189c551dfdafee61814e7de89b3f5.png)

Stardom's Ghasts is a Minecraft Fabric mod that adds armor for the new Happy Ghast mob. Currently, this mod adds the following:

- Armor
  - Leather Ghast Armor
    - Dyeable
    - Recipe:
      - Any Ghast Harness surrounded in leather
  - Chainmail Ghast Armor
    - Recipe:
      - Any Ghast Harness surrounded in chains
  - Gold Ghast Armor
    - Recipe:
      - Any Ghast Harness surrounded in gold ingots
  - Iron Ghast Armor
    - Recipe:
      - Any Ghast Harness surrounded in iron ingots
  - Diamond Ghast Armor
    - Recipe:
      - Any Ghast Harness surrounded in diamonds
  - Netherite Ghast Armor
    - Recipe:
      - Diamond Ghast Armor combined with a netherite ingot and netherite upgrade template in a smithing table
- Enchantments
  - Accelerated Flight
    - Allows Happy Ghasts to fly significantly faster
  - Deflection causes arrows to deflect off of the Happy Ghasts
